name: Live Playground indexes GitHub repo and answers code queries
description: Full playground flow: paste URL, index repo, verify graph, chat query

planSteps.description: Navigate to the playground page at the target URL followed by /playground.html
Verify the playground page heading 'Live Playground' is visible, with a URL input field and a button labeled 'Index Repository'
Verify the URL input is pre-filled with 'https://github.com/shdra06/ai-mind-map'
Click the 'Index Repository' button to start indexing the pre-filled GitHub repository
Verify a progress bar appears and the progress text shows a message about fetching or parsing files
Wait for the indexing to complete — the progress text should show a checkmark or 'Indexed' message and the stats bar should show non-zero values for Files, Functions, and Connections
Verify the knowledge graph in the center panel shows visible nodes (colored circles) connected by lines, representing the indexed codebase
Verify the file browser on the left shows a list of parsed files with file icons
Type 'How many functions?' in the chat input field and press Enter or click Send
Verify the chat shows a response from the bot containing a count of functions, classes, and files in the indexed repository
